basics.name: Vadim Nicolai
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 12+ years of experience building scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, Go, and Rust. Expert in modern frontend architectures, microservices, GraphQL APIs, and performance-critical systems. Shipping AI-powered personal projects (Nomadically.work, ResearchThera.com) with multi-model LLM orchestration, agentic pipelines, RAG search, and production observability. Domain expertise in E-commerce, FinTech, AI/ML, and enterprise SaaS.
basics.keySkills: React • TypeScript • JavaScript • Next.js • Node.js • Go • Rust • GraphQL • Apollo • REST API • Microservices • gRPC • AWS • Cloudflare • MongoDB • DynamoDB • Docker • CI/CD • Jest • Git • AI/LLM Orchestration

work.name: Vitrifi
work.summary:
• Architected and delivered micro-frontend portal architecture using Go microservices with gRPC and OpenAPI, integrating shared React components across multiple teams to improve development velocity and code reusability.
  • Led API migration from OpenAPI REST to GraphQL, implementing Apollo Server in Go and Apollo Client in React, reducing data over-fetching and improving frontend performance.
  • Drove frontend architecture decisions and technical leadership across multiple teams, establishing consistent design patterns and enforcing code quality through comprehensive PR reviews.
  • Optimized monorepo infrastructure by migrating from npm to PNPM with Turborepo caching, reducing CI/CD build times and improving developer productivity.
  • Designed and implemented integration testing strategy using Jest and React Testing Library, establishing automated test pipelines in CI/CD.
  • Tech stack: Go, Echo, gRPC, GraphQL, Apollo Server, OpenAPI, React, TypeScript, Apollo Client, React Query, Ant Design, Turborepo, PNPM, MongoDB, Jest, React Testing Library

work.name: Wunderman Thompson Commerce
work.summary:
• Built high-performance e-commerce components for shopping cart and checkout flow using React and TypeScript.
  • Implemented SSR with Next.js for improved SEO and page load performance.
  • Developed reusable UI components with Styled Components following atomic design principles.
  • Integrated payment gateway APIs (Stripe, PayPal) with PCI compliance.
  • Implemented compound components and custom hooks patterns for maintainable, scalable code.
  • Tech stack: React 17, Next.js 10, TypeScript, Styled Components, Jest, React Testing Library, Git, Agile/Scrum

work.name: Event Espresso
work.summary:
• Modernized legacy WordPress plugin admin interface with React and GraphQL, serving thousands of users on Event Smart SaaS platform.
  • Contributed open-source code to public GitHub repositories with 50+ merged PRs.
  • Established SASS/BEM architecture, component library patterns, and React best practices.
  • Improved code quality through unit testing with Jest and E2E testing with Playwright.
  • Collaborated with product team to design user interfaces for event registration and ticketing workflows.
  • Tech stack: React 16, React Apollo, GraphQL, WPGraphQL, WordPress, PHP, MySQL, Jest, Playwright.

work.name: Modus Create, Inc
work.summary:
• Project: AARP Money Map - Built scalable financial planning platform for AARP, helping millions of users navigate financial decisions.
  • Designed component-based UI library with 40+ reusable React components in collaboration with UX designers, ensuring WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility.
  • Implemented responsive design patterns with CSS Grid and Flexbox for optimal cross-device experience.
  • Developed state management solution using React Context API and custom hooks.
  • Configured CI/CD pipeline with Bitbucket Pipelines, Sentry, SonarQube, and AWS CodePipeline for automated testing and deployments.
  • Developed serverless backend APIs using AWS Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB for real-time data processing.
  • Tech stack: React 16.8, Hooks, Context API, React Apollo, Serverless Framework, GraphQL, DynamoDB, AWS Lambda, JavaScript ES6+

work.name: Atomate
work.summary:
• Project: Travlrr - Built reusable React component library using advanced patterns including Higher-Order Components (HOCs), render props, and compound components.
  • Implemented secure authentication system with AWS Lambda, Auth0, JWT tokens, and MongoDB.
  • Designed and built RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express.js following JSON:API specification.
  • Conducted code reviews and improved test coverage with Jest and Enzyme, reducing production bugs by 30%.
  • Optimized application performance through code splitting, lazy loading, and tree shaking, reducing initial bundle size by 45%.
  • Collaborated with UI/UX designers to implement pixel-perfect, responsive UI components with seamless mobile experience.
  • Tech stack: React 16, JavaScript ES6+, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, AWS Lambda, Auth0, Redux, Webpack

work.name: DevelopmentAID
work.summary:
• Built full-stack event planning application with Node.js, Express.js, Angular, and MongoDB.
  • Implemented JWT authentication, optimized MongoDB queries and database indexing.

work.name: Endava, ProPeople (FFW Agency), Best4u Group
work.summary:
• Built responsive frontends for enterprise clients including Stanford University (Drupal multisite), .NET applications, and WordPress platforms.
  • Developed custom themes, integrated RESTful APIs, and delivered pixel-perfect implementations using HTML5, CSS3, SASS, and jQuery.

aiProjects.name: Nomadically.work
aiProjects.description: AI job board aggregator for remote EU roles -- Next.js 16, GraphQL, Cloudflare D1, multi-model LLM pipeline.
highlights: Architected multi-LLM routing layer (Claude, DeepSeek, OpenAI) with Promptfoo + Mastra Evals for accuracy validation, zero-downtime model swaps, and cost-optimized inference.
Engineered agentic AI pipeline using Mastra agents, LangGraph, and Vercel AI SDK v6 for real-time job classification, skill extraction, and EU remote categorization.
Built RAG-powered hybrid search combining BM25 lexical scoring with vector embeddings (LlamaIndex) and text-to-SQL converting natural language queries into parameterized Drizzle ORM expressions.
Implemented event-driven ingestion from 3 ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby) via Trigger.dev with retry policies, dead-letter queues, and CI/CD-integrated pipeline validation.

Designed GraphQL API with DataLoader batching, end-to-end TypeScript type safety (Drizzle ORM + GraphQL Codegen), and Cloudflare D1 Gateway Worker with 10-100x throughput improvement via batch queries and stale-while-revalidate caching.

aiProjects.name: ResearchThera.com
aiProjects.description: AI therapeutic journaling platform -- agentic orchestration, 7-source research pipeline, clinical NLP, RAG, voice synthesis. Next.js 16, GraphQL, Cloudflare D1/R2.
highlights: Designed multi-stage agentic workflow: clinical NLP normalization -> parallel 7-source research ingestion -> OpenAlex enrichment (300 candidates) -> LLM quality gate -> top-20 persistence to D1 + vector store for RAG retrieval.
Built custom evaluation scorer using DeepSeek-as-judge for evidence validation; tuned 3-threshold gating (relevance 0.75, confidence 0.55, blended 0.72) to filter unsupported clinical claims.
Implemented Langfuse prompt versioning with runtime registry loading for no-deploy prompt updates, distributed tracing, per-model cost tracking, and A/B prompt evaluation.
Engineered serverless TTS microservice with RAG-based content chunking, streaming audio to R2 via Trigger.dev v4 durable background tasks.

volunteer.summary:
• Contributed 100+ pull requests to core trading engine and exchange connectivity modules in Rust and Python.
  • Built production exchange adapters for dYdX v4 and Hyperliquid with REST, WebSocket, gRPC, authentication, rate limiting, and execution clients.
  • Enhanced OKX and Kraken integrations with historical data support, pagination, and WebSocket reliability improvements.
  • Implemented high-performance technical indicators in Rust with Python/Cython parity, improving PnL calculations and monetary precision.
